description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a low-pitched, brown gable roof and a mix of stucco and stone exterior walls. The front yard is xeriscaped with gravel, sparse vegetation, and two benches, enclosed by a low metal fence. The house features a single-car garage with a dark brown door, a small covered porch, and a green trash bin near the entrance. The backyard is surrounded by a solid tan wall and contains a concrete patio area with a pergola and some outdoor furniture. Windows are modestly sized and asymmetrically placed, with some covered by security bars. The overall design is practical and unadorned, typical of mid- to late-20th-century ranch-style homes in arid urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story ranch-style house with a brown gable roof, stucco and stone exterior, xeriscaped front yard, and a fenced backyard with a patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, xeriscaped yard, benches, and metal fence.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side yard, stone wall section, and the transition to the backyard with a tan privacy wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pergola, solid tan wall, and some graffiti on the garage roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side yard, additional fencing, and a leafless tree near the sidewalk.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple covered porch with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent garage; no steps or decorative columns.
